title: Frontier Legends
description:
Frontier Legends is a large-scale Fabric adventure modpack featuring 110 carefully selected mods focused on exploration, immersive travel, enhanced combat, and massive structure overhauls. 

Discover upgraded strongholds, temples, dungeons, and dimension i
body:
![Frontier Legends](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c38a16bca844457a1bd45ba098ab8d822794c46e.png)

# FEATURES

- ✔ Large-Scale Adventure Experience (110 Carefully Selected Mods)
  
- ✔ Massive Structure Overhaul (YUNG’s Strongholds, Mineshafts, Temples, Nether & End Improvements)
  
- ✔ Enhanced World Generation & Exploration
  
- ✔ Land, Sea & Sky Travel (Cars, Ships & Aircraft)
  
- ✔ RPG-Style Combat with Better Combat & Immersive Armors
  
- ✔ Powerful Artifacts & Unique Loot
  
- ✔ Expanded Dungeons Across All Dimensions
  
- ✔ Advanced Building Systems (Furniture, Diagonal Blocks, Decorations)
  
- ✔ Rollercoaster Engineering & Creative Expansion
  
- ✔ Immersive Atmosphere (Dynamic Lighting, Environmental Effects, Shader Support)
  
- ✔ Performance Optimized (Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, FerriteCore & More)
  
- ✔ Waystones & Quality-of-Life Improvements
  
- ✔ Xaero’s Minimap Integration
  
- ✔ Grave System & Player Animation Enhancements
  
- ✔ Fully Fabric 1.21.1 Compatible


![Auto Mobility](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FoundationGames/Automobility/1.18.2/md/banner.png)

![Sun & Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g4bSYbrU/images/60a70d9d2efc665ed5cde1d0c464c0e698648aea_350.webp) ![Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/e2bgeSv4/images/6cdd6a3c2bb154d49ff27451af91f4611d51cd94_350.webp)

## 🌟 Why Frontier Legends?

> Frontier Legends is not just a collection of mods — it’s a carefully structured adventure experience built around exploration, immersion, and long-term survival progression.

> ✔ Massive World Variety  
> Every dimension is expanded with upgraded structures, reworked dungeons, and enhanced generation to keep exploration fresh and rewarding.

> ✔ Land, Sea & Sky Travel  
> Drive cars, sail ships, and fly aircraft to explore your world in ways vanilla never allowed.

> ✔ RPG-Style Progression  
> Enhanced combat, immersive armor sets, artifacts, and meaningful loot create a deeper survival experience.

> ✔ Builder & Creative Friendly  
> Expanded furniture, decorative blocks, diagonal building, and engineering features allow for detailed, immersive builds.

> ✔ Performance Optimized  
> Despite having 110+ mods, Frontier Legends includes major optimization mods to ensure smooth gameplay and stable world generation.

> ✔ Designed for Long-Term Worlds  
> Balanced for extended survival playthroughs, multiplayer servers, and cinematic exploration.

> Frontier Legends is built for players who want more than vanilla — without sacrificing performance or stability.


### 💻 System Requirements

- 4GB RAM allocated to Minecraft
- 4-Core CPU
- Basic dedicated GPU (GTX 750 / RX 550 or better)
- SSD recommended

Note:
First world generation may be slower due to expanded structures.
Lower render distance (8–10 chunks) for smoother gameplay.
